vocab.example: What I admired most was her pedagogical expertise, as she could simplify the most complex mathematical theorems.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra một môi trường học tập thuận lợi
vocab.example: He had a knack for fostering a conducive learning environment where every student felt brave enough to speak up.
Her history lessons were incredibly intellectually stimulating, often sparking debates that lasted well after the bell rang.

vocab.meaning: chỗ dựa vững chắc (về tinh thần/học tập)
vocab.example: During my final exams, my homeroom teacher was a pillar of support, helping me manage my stress effectively.

vocab.meaning: là tấm gương cho sự tận tụy
vocab.example: He truly exemplified dedication by staying late every afternoon to provide extra tutoring for struggling students.
Her charismatic persona made her the most popular figure in school; everyone looked forward to her lectures.
My geography teacher really broadened my horizons by sharing stories of his travels to remote corners of the globe.

vocab.meaning: để lại dấu ấn không thể phai mờ
vocab.example: His unconventional advice on resilience left an indelible mark on my character that persists to this day.

vocab.meaning: điều chỉnh phương pháp cho phù hợp (với từng cá nhân)
vocab.example: She was excellent at tailoring her approach to suit the different learning speeds of everyone in the class.

vocab.meaning: khiến người khác phải nể trọng
vocab.example: He didn't need to be strict to command respect; his natural authority and wisdom were enough.
